children.title: Components
Decisions
children.summary: All 3 org decisions. Highest retrieval priority after org.yaml.

children.title: Agastya targeting Scientech and Nivo Controls
children.summary: Agastya targeting Scientech and Nivo Controls
children.content:
Decision: Agastya targeting Scientech and Nivo Controls
Date: 2026-04-03
Project: agastya
Made by: jay-suryawanshi
Canonical: True

Agastya will target Scientech and Nivo Controls as primary enterprise customers. This governs all GTM activities and outreach prioritisation.

children.title: Neo is not a chatbot
children.content:
Decision: Neo is not a chatbot
Date: 2026-04-01
Project: threadverse
Made by: shreyash-dange
Canonical: True

Neo is NOT a chatbot. It does not do customer support. It does not wait to be asked. Neo is Cogneoverse's embedded org intelligence layer — the platform's nervous system. Every message, decision, and thread is Neo's input. The UI is just the surface. This decision governs all architecture choices for ThreadVerse and Neo.

children.title: No vector DBs or embeddings in Neo
children.summary: No vector DBs or embeddings in Neo
children.content:
Decision: No vector DBs or embeddings in Neo
Date: 2026-04-01
Project: neo
Made by: shreyash-dange
Canonical: True

Neo uses PageIndex (tree-based, vectorless RAG) and ChatIndex instead of vector databases or embedding similarity search. Structured reasoning only.
